overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a rural dirt path. The character travels from dense forest vegetation through open farmland with wooden fences and haystacks, approaching a medieval village entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow forest trail with dense vegetation

events.description: windmill becomes visible in the distance across the field
exiting dense forest vegetation into open farmland

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along a narrow dirt path surrounded by tall grass and trees

entered.detail: tall deciduous trees forming a dense forest wall on the left side of the path
narrow winding dirt trail through the vegetation
tall green grass and leafy bushes lining the right side of the path
distant windmill visible on the horizon across the field
golden wheat field stretching to the horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a dense forested area with tall trees on the left and thick vegetation on the right. Geralt walks along a narrow dirt path. Around 6 seconds, a windmill becomes visible in the distance across the wheat field. By 12 seconds, the dense vegetation opens up into farmland.

scene_state.functional_zone: open farmland path with wooden fencing

events.description: wooden fence appears along the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing along the path as the landscape opens into fields

entered.detail: rustic wooden fence made of logs marking the field boundary
conical haystacks scattered in the field to the left

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into wide farmland with golden wheat fields. A wooden fence appears on the right side around 20 seconds, and haystacks become visible in the field to the left. The windmill remains visible in the distance as Geralt walks along the dirt path.

events.description: village structures and entrance arch become visible ahead

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along the fenced road toward the distant village

entered.detail: wooden village entrance arch with red and white banners
low stone wall running parallel to the fence

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a fenced dirt road with haystacks now close on the left. The wooden fence runs continuously on the right. Around 40 seconds, a village entrance arch with banners becomes visible in the distance, signaling the approach to civilization.

events.description: passing under the village entrance arch into the settlement
path curves slightly as fence moves from right to left side

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the village entrance and into the settlement area

entered.detail: wooden medieval-style houses and structures of the village
wooden barrels and crates placed beside the path
tall wooden post with lantern or sign

segments.scene_description: Geralt passes under the village entrance arch with red banners, entering the settlement. The wooden fence shifts to the left side as the path curves. Wooden buildings appear on the left, and barrels are visible on the right. The environment transitions from open farmland to a structured village setting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as Geralt travels from a secluded forest through open farmland and into a structured medieval village. It begins on a narrow dirt path flanked by tall trees and thick vegetation, which gradually opens up to reveal a distant windmill across a wheat field. As the dense greenery gives way to wide golden farmland, the camera tracks alongside a wooden fence and scattered haystacks while the windmill remains a focal point on the horizon. The scene then shifts toward the outskirts of civilization as a village entrance arch with red banners appears in the distance. Finally, the camera passes under the arch and enters the settlement, where the open fields are replaced by wooden buildings and barrels as the path curves into the village.
